step_rationale: Causal metabolite in coronary atherosclerosis; lipid-core accumulation marker.
mechanism: Triacylglycerol (52:5) is a causal metabolite in coronary atherosclerosis, accumulated in atherogenic lipid cores and associated with lesion instability.

references.title: Lipidomics-based investigation of its impact on the pathogenesis of coronary atherosclerosis: a Mendelian randomization study.
